### Key Context

**Revenue model with Shivam**: 50/50 split on recruiting commissions (~$7-10K per placement → $3-5K to Careerspan). Three placements/month hits target.

**Decision timeline**: March/April checkpoint to evaluate acquisition signals vs. market traction. Continuation contingent on hitting revenue targets (specifically Ilsa's salary coverage by end of February).

**Current pipeline**: Grew from 3 to ~10 qualified engineers this week; target is 2-3x weekly growth through automated candidate onboarding.
